_doc: Generic enforcement SSOT — delegated from an agent's PreToolUse hook via `harness pre bash|write`. Copy to .harness/enforcement.json in your repo and add project rules. These defaults are domain-agnostic.

_actions.block: stdout {"decision":"block","reason":"..."} — supported runtimes veto the tool call

pre_bash.reason: force-push to main/master detected. Prefer --force-with-lease, or add `# force-ok <reason>` if intentional.

pre_bash.desc: raw runpod/vast CLI, SDK install, or API call — FORBIDDEN, must go through `hexa cloud`
pre_bash.reason: runpod/vast CLI·API·SDK 직접 사용 전면 금지 (commons c12) — 예외 없음. GPU 클라우드는 반드시 `hexa cloud` 로: `hexa cloud run <host> -- <argv...>` (structured-argv remote dispatch · 31 sub-verbs). 실행중 작업은 `harness ing pod add` 로 보드 등록. 정책 변경이 필요하면 config/enforcement.json 의 이 규칙을 직접 수정해야 한다.
piping a remote download straight into a shell runs unreviewed code. Download, inspect, then run — or add `# curl-pipe-ok <reason>`.

pre_bash.desc: rm -rf on a dangerously broad path
pre_bash.reason: rm -rf on / ~ $HOME or bare * is almost never intended. Scope the path, or add `# rm-ok <reason>`.

pre_write.desc: agent settings must delegate to harness, not inline shell logic
pre_write.reason: Hook commands should delegate to `harness pre|post|prompt`, not inline shell. Put the rule in enforcement.json instead — one SSOT, testable, versioned.

pre_write.desc: no suppression/bypass without a justification marker (cross-language)
pre_write.reason: Suppression/bypass pattern detected — fix the root cause, don't hide the symptom. Covers JS/TS (@ts-ignore, eslint-disable), Python (# type: ignore, # noqa, except: pass), Go (//nolint), Rust (#[allow(...)]), Swift (swiftlint:disable), C/C++ (#pragma ... diagnostic ignored, NOLINT), plus TODO/FIXME. If genuinely justified, add `@root-cause-ok <reason>` on the same line.
Possible hardcoded secret. Read it from an environment variable / secret store. If this is a placeholder/example, add `// @secret-ok`.

prompt_hints.desc: when asked to fix/patch/work-around, prefer root-cause
prompt_hints.hint: Prefer the root cause over a suppression. Avoid @ts-ignore / eslint-disable / empty catch / leaving a bare TODO. If a workaround is genuinely justified, mark it with `@root-cause-ok <reason>`. (pre_write G-ROOT-CAUSE auto-flags these on write.)
